buildCommand: npx astro build && npx pagefind --site dist

headers.value: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https:; font-src 'self' https: data:; connect-src 'self' https:; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
